rationale: Keep this pair because the citing paper is explicitly about debt-repayment “small victories” and states it extends prior work on subgoals and debt repayment, while the cited 2011 JMRK paper is a core debt-repayment psychology study (debt account aversion, small-balance-first behavior, and interventions). The topical and construct overlap is strong enough that this is plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental background mention, and the DOI-level match confirms the specific reference.
